name: forrt-replication-zarr-consistency
description: Fault-injection replication testing whether Icechunk-backed transactional Zarr stores eliminate the metadata-data inconsistencies that affect disconnected STAC-style metadata indexes over object storage, including a positive control for the conditional-write/CAS guarantee on a real S3-compatible object store (NIRD/Sigma2).

referencePublication.name: zarr-datafusion-search README — Synchronization
referencePublication.description: Question-rooted chain: no upstream paper. This GitHub README is the primary citable source of the headline claim under test (no DOI — see nanopubs/drafts/00_paper_summary.md).
